file_name: Questionnaire - Opal Healthcare - Greenwich Place residential aged care home.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the competitive impact of the Acquisition on the supply of residential aged care services. Are Opal Healthcare facilities and Greenwich Place close competitors and what alternatives are available?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Opal Healthcare and/or Greenwich Place.
